reference_sql: WITH ordered AS (  SELECT netuid, stake,     ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY netuid ORDER BY stake) AS i,     COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY netuid) AS n,     SUM(stake) OVER (PARTITION BY netuid) AS total   FROM metagraph   WHERE stake > 0) SELECT netuid,   1 - (2.0 / (n * NULLIF(total, 0))) * SUM(stake * (n + 1 - i)) AS gini FROM ordered GROUP BY netuid, n, total HAVING n > 1 ORDER BY gini DESC
